title: Generative & Procedural Modeling
description: Generative AI and procedural methods for synthesizing detailed 3D content, urban environments, and assets at scale.

title: 2D Imaging & 3D Reconstruction
description: Recovering geometry and structure from images, turning 2D photographs and sensor data into accurate 3D reconstructions.

title: Geospatial Modeling
description: Modeling and analyzing large-scale geospatial data, remote sensing imagery, and the built and natural environment.

title: Simulation for Visual Computing
description: Physically based and data-driven simulation to drive realistic visual computing, animation, and urban-scale analysis.
